faqs.question: What determines the cost of hornet removal in East Elmhurst?
faqs.answer: Hornet removal pricing between $350-$550 depends on several factors including nest size, location accessibility, height requiring specialized equipment, and the hornet species. Ground-level nests are typically less expensive than those in attics, eaves, or high trees. We provide free estimates and clear pricing before beginning any work.
